meaning: n.(作单数用)老人病学,老人病科
examples: A new study in the Journal of the American Geriatrics Society looked at this question by examining the personality characteristics of 246 children of people who had lived to be at least 100.
He will complain about having to spend time with such a boring bunch of geriatrics.
The study was published in the Journal of the American Geriatrics Society.
But the geriatrics made us think that the whole thing was about to go into terminal care.
The impact of this dwindling resource pool will be amplified and felt even more in specialist areas such as geriatrics.
